title: neolitsea hsiangkweiensis
intro: Neolitsea hsiangkweiensis, a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, is an evergreen shrub native to China. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neolitsea hsiangkweiensis include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of certain types of infections. In terms of herbal preparations, Neolitsea hsiangkweiensis is often made into tea or used as a decoction to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
